programme.desc: Charles Babbage's brilliant mind was way ahead of its time. Babbage invented a fully functional mechanical calculator that became the foundation of the modern-day computer.

programme.title: Live + Local
programme.desc: A work-place comedy about 'TnT In The Morning,' a Christian morning radio show team on KHUGG-FM. The fake show plays out in real-time with real celebrity guests and hilarious behind the scenes drama.

programme.title: The Adventures of Skippy
programme.desc: The Hammonds meet a family who travel by caravan and put on shows featuring snakes. Daughter Emma befriends Lou but confesses she's tired of moving around. She runs away.

programme.title: Glass Babies
programme.desc: A tale of love, blackmail and murder set against the world of surrogacy. The Craigs turn to IVF and a surrogate mother with tragic consequences.

programme.title: Waiting
programme.desc: A group of female friends return home from locations around the world to help another friend have her child. While there, they reminisce and catch up on each other's lives.

programme.title: Windrider
programme.desc: A female rock singer romances a champion surfer, but just as it seems life couldn't get better setbacks threaten a wipeout. Nicole Kidman stars in her first adult role, with Tom Burlinson.

programme.title: Blue Fin
programme.desc: After their fishing trip goes awry, leaving the crew shipwrecked, a young boy holds the key to save everyone from disaster.

programme.title: Rough Diamonds
programme.desc: A traffic accident leads to romance and the realisation of dreams for a lawyer's wife and an Australian truck driver.

programme.title: The Adventures of Skippy
programme.desc: Thelma takes the boat out into dangerous parts of the river. Will she be found in time?

programme.title: The Naked Wanderer
programme.desc: Jake is dumped, fired and humiliated. In an attempt to win back his ex, he embarks on a hilariously wild charity stunt by walking up the western coast of Australia.

programme.title: Blackrock
programme.desc: When a young schoolgirl is raped and murdered, the mateship between a group of surfers is tested as the truth is slowly revealed.

programme.title: West of Sunshine
programme.desc: Separated from his family and caught in a cycle of gambling and debt, Jim has less than a day to repay a violent loan shark, while looking after his young son.

programme.title: Midnite Spares
programme.desc: An Australian sprint-car driver woos a hot-dog vendor Ruth and crushes an auto-parts theft ring.

programme.title: Stir
programme.desc: Tensions between guards and inmates at an Australian prison reach a boiling point, culminating in a bloody riot.

programme.title: Stone
programme.desc: Stone is an undercover cop who rides with the Grave Diggers motorbike gang to discover who's killing their members one by one.

programme.title: The Getting of Wisdom
programme.desc: The film is set in 1890s Victoria, when Laura (Susannah Fowle) enters an exclusive ladies' boarding school. The film follows her struggle for acceptance and her friendships.

programme.title: Fran
programme.desc: After a messy divorce, a newly single mother is left to care for her kids and juggle her love-life. When she wants more in her life, she starts to fall for a barman named Jeff.

programme.title: Mr. Reliable
programme.desc: Police believe small-time crook Wally Mellish has his wife and child as hostages, as he relishes the media circus.

programme.title: The Adventures of Skippy
programme.desc: Thelma takes the boat out into dangerous parts of the river. Will she be found in time?

programme.title: A Fortunate Life

programme.title: Two Hands

programme.title: Stranded

programme.title: Peter Allen: The Boy From Oz

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Hodges and Wendy take a group of students on a field trip through the crime lab.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Catherine investigates the case of a student found dead near her daughter's school, leading to a world of racism and a dark secret from one of the school crew uncovered.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the death of a legendary comedian who appears to have died under mysterious circumstances. Langston and Sara try to solve the case of a bullet-ridden corpse.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSIs assist Brass in helping a family friend to solve the disappearance of her family during a car accident.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A reporter covering the Dr Jekyll serial murders is strangled to death and the victim's husband accuses Ray of the crime and of other deaths in the past that his wife investigated.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSIs attempt to capture the elusive Dr Jekyll with the help of another serial murderer, Nate Haskell, who claims to know who he is.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the deaths of two high-school students involved in illegal street racing.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The bass guitarist of a country music band is electrocuted during a concert. He recovers with partial memory loss, which helps begin the CSIs investigation into possible sabotage.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The body of a 14-year-old boy is discovered in a field and the investigation reveals the victim has blood under his fingernails that matches a convicted killer who is in prison for murdering his wife.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Detective Vartann and Catherine pose as a couple during a stakeout on a drug operation; Langston and Nick work on a case involving a woman's death linked to a fetish club.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Langston investigates the murder of a family and thinks he's finally found a suspect for Dr Jekyll. But all is not what it seems.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The eleventh season of CSI begins where the team is concerned for Langston after he is stabbed by serial killer Nate Haskell. Meanwhile, a bombing occurs at a police funeral.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A woman is attacked by a shark at the Golden Nugget Casino pool. The main suspect is the owner of the rival casino. Also, a scuba diver is found dead in a shark aquarium.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A convention of vampires and werewolves is featured. A member of the Vampire Cult is decapitated and the CSIs plunge into a world of creeds and a legendary rivalry between these mythological creatures.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Sqweegel is the forensic-proof serial killer from the first Level 26 novel, Dark Origins, who kills people who have secrets and tries to get them to confess to something they have done in order to stay alive.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: In this episode, the CSIs visit a hoarder's house, where they find more than one body.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A body of a college student is found in the desert and appears to have been punctured by dinosaur teeth. Meanwhile, the shooting of a business man leads the CSIs to two teen murders that happened five years ago.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSIs try put a body back together, after it is literally shredded.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate after several sources for a newspaper article of illegal natural gas dumping are found dead.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The sky is falling, or at least people are. Ray, Catherine, and Nick try to figure out if it was murder or suicide when a man is found dead after falling from a hotel.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The wife of an FBI agent is murdered. The FBI agent had been chasing a serial paedophile, who is suspected of kidnapping the agent's children.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain
programme.desc: Dr Harold Shipman is one of the world's worst serial killers. In 2000, he was convicted of murdering 215 patients by lethal injection.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain
programme.desc: In 1992, a 25-year-old was abducted from an empty house and held for eight torturous days in a makeshift coffin.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain
programme.desc: In 1996, two girls and their mother were attacked in the English countryside of Kent. Local loner Michael Stone carried out a brutal and frenzied hammer attack on the family and left them for dead.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain
programme.desc: In 2000, Sarah Payne vanished while playing in a field near her grandparents' home. For 17 days, the police launched one of the biggest hunts in the UK to find the little girl.

programme.title: See No Evil
programme.desc: Roommates prepare to say goodbye, but they don't know it will be forever.

programme.title: See No Evil

programme.title: Sins & Secrets
programme.desc: When the full story of what happened to 28-year-old Kate Waring was revealed, it would uncover a lesson in naive trust that rocked the social fabric of this city at the heart of the old south.

programme.title: Sins & Secrets
programme.desc: When 28-year-old nursemaid Suzette Trouten inexplicably vanished, investigators soon discovered that she shared ties with a slew of missing women - ties fashioned by a sex-crazed serial killer.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: A man is found shot to death on the street. Detectives Bill Hanson and Mike Carroll follow two clues that could lead to a suspect - a dropped cell phone and a pawnshop slip in the victim's pocket.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: In Minneapolis, just days before Christmas, Sgt Rick Zimmerman and Sgt Tammy Diedrich are called to the murder of a young woman, found strangled in a partially burnt car.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: In Dallas, detectives Scott Sayers and Ken Penrod are investigating a home invasion that left a young man dead. Is their suspect a young suburban mum, or a criminal mastermind?

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: In Miami, Sgt Louis Melancon and Det Carlos Castellanos investigate the murder of two men gunned down in a residential street. Detectives learn that a roommate of the two victims is missing.

programme.title: Cold Blood
programme.desc: On a lonely stretch of Illinois highway just outside Decatur, an abandoned car ignites the search for a vivacious and popular young mother. Investigators comb the vehicle for clues.

programme.title: Cold Blood

programme.desc: This episode Gregg and Chris are with the Austen family from Sussex, tackling the highest expenditure on food they've ever encountered.

programme.title: Cook Clever, Waste Less with Prue & Rupy
programme.desc: In London, Vikkie and Wayne's nightly backup meals for fussy kids double their shopping bills and send food waste soaring.

programme.title: Mary Berry's Quick Cooking
programme.desc: Mary is out in London's West End. The area attracts millions of visitors each year and Mary is joining them to seek out the secrets of getting busy people fed quickly and well.

programme.title: Jamie's Quick & Easy Food
programme.desc: Jamie's cooking up his smoky chorizo salmon, a high-speed supper. Then, his potato and artichoke al forno is a crazily tasty, effortless veggie dish.

programme.title: The Chocolate Queen
programme.desc: Acclaimed pastry chef Kirsten Tibballs returns with expert tips, creative techniques and clever shortcuts to help elevate homemade desserts and inspire confidence in every baker.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: It's Judges' Day, and only one chef can go through to represent Northern Ireland. The judges are joined by a world record-holding and multi gold-medallist Paralympian.

programme.title: The Great Australian Bake Off
programme.desc: In the grand finale, our remaining bakers face off to win the title of Australia's Best Amateur Baker, making botanical cakes, Paris-Brests and a showstopper of their choice.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: It's the semifinal and the last four bakers are three patisserie challenges away from the biggest day in their baking lives. But first up, there's no business like choux business.

programme.title: Paul Hollywood Eats Mexico
programme.desc: Paul Hollywood is off on another culinary voyage of discovery to a country that is as yet a mystery to him: Mexico. He wants to explore the character, culture and history of Mexico through its food and drink.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Cornwall
programme.desc: Rick discovers Europe's largest tea plantation on the banks of the River Fal, bakes a simple yet sumptuous fruit tea loaf and finds out how Cornwall inspired Charles Dickens.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Cornwall
programme.desc: After soaking up the ambiance at one of the UK's last live cattle markets in Truro, Rick's in the mood for steak and kidney pud, before setting sail out of Falmouth in a hand-built boat.

programme.title: The Royal
programme.desc: Ormerod and Weatherill lay Caroline's memory to rest; Mr. Rose tries a change of image.

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: The UCOS team exhumes the body of car crash victim Victoria Fleeting after her husband David claims to have seen her at a local playground 18 months after her death.

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: When clips of a film noir are mysteriously posted on the internet, UCOS is forced to re-open the investigation into the producer's death.

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: During a snowstorm in Dartmoor, hotel guests hold a seance for fun, but events turn dark when the table warns that a local is in danger.

programme.title: Hustle
programme.desc: Power struggle between Mickey & Danny is fierce as ever. Each claims to be best man to lead team, no amount of arguing will settle dispute so tensions keep rising.

programme.title: Whitstable Pearl
programme.desc: Pearl is missing Charlie. Mike is missing Pearl, but a death at a wedding brings them together as Pearl is a witness to family rivalry, angry ex-girlfriends and lies.

programme.title: Downton Abbey
programme.desc: The Crawleys head to Northumberland for a shooting party at a castle, before returning to Downton to celebrate Christmas.

programme.title: Blandings
programme.desc: Clarence must stop his brother Galahad from publishing his memoirs and ruining the family name.

programme.title: The Coroner
programme.desc: Jane's fear of heights is tested when she and Davey investigate a skydiving accident.

programme.title: Happy Valley
programme.desc: Tommy urges Frances to go further with her attempts at making Catherine's life a misery.

programme.title: The Blues Brothers
programme.desc: The orphanage where Jake and Elwood were raised will be sold unless the tax on the property is paid within days. The brothers decide to raise the money by putting their band back together.

programme.title: Apollo 13
programme.desc: Houston, we have a problem - a fuel leak that threatens to doom three astronauts in space during NASA's 1970 moon mission.

programme.title: Naked Gun 2 1/2: The Smell Of Fear
programme.desc: Frank Drebin, the idiot detective, uncovers a plot by super villain Robert Goulet to sabotage the USA's energy policy. More slapstick mayhem in the first sequel to the comedy classic.

programme.title: Ferris Bueller's Day Off
programme.desc: Larger than life, and blessed with a magical sense of serendipity, Ferris Bueller is a model for all those who take themselves too seriously.

programme.title: The Game
programme.desc: Run by the shadowy Consumer Recreations Services, the Game never quite declares its rules or objectives, but soon Nicholas finds himself in its grasp, and his ordered life starts to fall apart.

programme.title: The Hunt for Red October
programme.desc: A Russian submarine commander attempts to defect to the US, bringing both sides to the brink of war.

programme.title: Twister
programme.desc: Thrill-seeking meteorologists are chasing the most destructive tornado in 50 years.

programme.desc: A pilot is selected to attend the Top Gun Naval Flying School while also pursuing a relationship with an instructor.

programme.title: Kindergarten Cop
programme.desc: Follows an undercover cop whose attempt to locate a boy and his mother leads him to a kindergarten where he poses as an unlikely teacher. A classic comedy with a sharp crime edge to it.

programme.desc: Hollywood's hottest star turns down a hack producer for his new movie, so he is lured into a series of bizarre scenes that secretly film his every move.

programme.desc: Join an African prince on an unforgettable comic quest to the New World, as it's time for him to find a princess.

programme.title: Coming to America
programme.desc: Join an African prince on an unforgettable comic quest to the New World, as it's time for him to find a princess.

programme.title: Grease
programme.desc: Things are really hoppin' at Rydell High when Danny discovers the object of his summer fling, Sandy, has moved to town and enrolled in his school.

programme.title: Twelve Monkeys
programme.desc: In a future world devastated by disease, a convict is sent back in time to gather information about the man-made virus that wiped out most of the human population.

programme.title: The 6th Day
programme.desc: A helicopter pilot who survives a near-fatal accident, returns home to find out that has been replaced by a duplicate version of himself.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: A battle between two alien robot clans, the Autobots and the Decepticons, is reignited on Earth, with a teenage boy being the only one who holds the power to stop it.

programme.title: Bad Boys 2
programme.desc: Burnett and Lowrey reunite as out-of-control, trash-talking cops. Bullets fly, cars crash, and laughs explode as they pursue a whacked-out drug lord from the streets of Miami to the barrios of Cuba.

programme.title: Out of Sight
programme.desc: A bank robber escaping jail finds himself stealing something more precious than money - a Federal Marshall's heart - risking it all to find out if there's more between them than just the law.

programme.title: Scream
programme.desc: After a series of mysterious deaths befall their small town, an offbeat group of friends led by Sidney Prescott become the target of a masked killer.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: A spy is on a mission to disprove false accusations made against him by the very government organisation that he works for.

programme.title: Barbarella
programme.desc: In the far future, in a time of way-out, psychedelic spaceships and free love, space agent Barbarella is assigned to stop the evil Durand-Durand and save humanity.

programme.title: Barb Wire
programme.desc: Barb Wire is a bar owner/mercenary, persuaded to help her former lover in the fight against the fascist dictatorship in USA 2017.

programme.title: Duel
programme.desc: A travelling salesman is harassed by a menacing 40-tonne truck on a remote desert highway.

programme.title: Repo Man
programme.desc: A young punk recruited by a car repossession agency finds himself in pursuit of a Chevrolet Malibu that is wanted for a $20,000 bounty and has something otherworldly stashed in its trunk.

programme.title: Tremors
programme.desc: With the help of a seismology student, Val and Earl discover their desolate town is infested with huge man-eating creatures living below the ground. The race is on to defeat these slimy subterraneans.

programme.title: Design X Stories
programme.desc: Today's theme: Vanishing Tools. As the rising age of artisans puts the survival of certain crafts at risk, we shine a light on the vanishing tools used to keep them alive, and their anonymous designs.

programme.title: Cycle Around Taiwan
programme.desc: The second episode of our Taiwan series features indigenous cultures in the south and on the east coast. We meet a Rukai man preserving the forest and Bunun people with a stunning choral tradition.

programme.title: I Love 'Mee'
programme.desc: Mee wets the bed even after making sure to go to the bathroom and not drink any water before bed. Through a "Bedwetting Counselor," Mee learns that physical growth varies from person to person...

programme.title: Design Ah neo

programme.title: J-Melo
programme.desc: Join May J. for great Japanese music! This week, anisong legend Takahashi Yoko sings Neon Genesis Evangelion theme songs. Also coming to chat and perform is Ado-produced idol group Phantom Siita.

programme.title: Little Charo
programme.desc: Little Charo is an animation series about a Japanese dog who got lost in NY. "I want to see my owner again!" Charo starts his adventure back home. Season 1-5.

programme.title: Chatroom Japan
programme.desc: All moms need some "me time." That's why one forward-thinking woman in Kyoto established Mamo Heart, a space for mothers to not only relax, but also get their own business ideas off the ground.

programme.title: Impacts: Climates Change the World
programme.desc: Global warming leads to widespread famine. By the end of the century, it is predicted that yields of maize, soybeans, and wheat may fall by 30-40%. We examine the scientific data on this global issue.

programme.title: Design Museum Japan
programme.desc: Tagawa Kinya (Design engineer)investigates the process of design by looking at the work of Yanagi Sori, who shaped products by making models using different materials.

programme.title: The Factory Wonders
programme.desc: This time, we explore a Nanbu ironware factory blending traditional molds and casting techniques with modern design. See masterful skills and a president's passion for ironware reimagined for today.

programme.title: Time-Lapse Japan
programme.desc: Shugendo, a unique spiritual tradition, dates back 1,300 years. Through beautiful time-lapse footage, we show its practitioners and Kumano's sacred forests, long associated with death and rebirth.

programme.title: Moon Dance
programme.desc: A breezy blend of feel-good vibes and irresistible grooves.

programme.title: Sunrise Set
programme.desc: Feel-good favourites to start your morning right.

programme.title: Hits & Feels
programme.desc: A steady wave of feel-good anthems!

programme.title: Totally Timeless
programme.desc: The ultimate mix of guitar-driven anthems and singalong favourites. From soaring choruses to easy rock staples, these are the tracks that never go out of style.

programme.title: District B13: Ultimatum
programme.desc: Explosive sequel set in a futuristic Paris. Corrupt cops conspire to launch a nuclear strike and take over a ghetto terrorised by marauding drug gangs and killers. Subtitles.

programme.title: The Fall
programme.desc: A bedridden stuntman entrances a little girl with tales of exotic heroes. As his health reaches the point of peril so does the story he's telling, with dramatic consequences. An epic fantasy.

programme.title: Arctic
programme.desc: Sole-survivor of a plane crash, and stranded deep within the Arctic Circle, Overgard is waiting to be rescued, when a sudden turn of events finds him no longer on his own.

programme.title: The Raid
programme.desc: A SWAT team is trapped in a tenement run by a ruthless mobster and his army of killers and thugs. Stranded on the sixth floor, they must fight their way through the city's worst to survive.

programme.title: Naked Weapon
programme.desc: A group of girls are kidnapped and trained to become assassins for a criminal organisation, ruled over by the ruthless Madam M.

programme.title: Cypher
programme.desc: Paranoia drives this hi-tech cyber thriller when a computer programmer who turns to corporate espionage is caught in a spiral where even his own identity is put in doubt.

programme.title: Wasabi
programme.desc: The death of a ex-lover puts a French cop on a collision course with the Yakuza and the daughter he never knew he had.

programme.title: The Texas Chain Saw Massacre
programme.desc: Teenagers are tortured, chopped up and impaled on meat hooks by a demented backwards family. This grisly 1974 blood-curdler ranks with Psycho and Halloween as a landmark in the horror/slasher genre.

programme.title: Winnie the Pooh: Blood and Honey
programme.desc: After Christopher Robin abandons them for college, Pooh and Piglet embark on a bloody rampage as they search for a new source of food.

programme.title: Winnie The Pooh: Blood And Honey 2
programme.desc: Not wanting to live in the shadows any longer, Winnie-the-Pooh, Piglet, Owl and Tigger take their fight to the town of Ashdown, leaving a bloody trail of death and mayhem in their wake.

programme.title: Deliver Us
programme.desc: When a nun in a remote convent claims immaculate conception, priests investigate, concerned she will give birth to twin boys: one the Messiah, the other the Anti-Christ.

programme.title: Infernal Affairs
programme.desc: Chen Wing Yan, a young police officer, has been sent undercover as a mole in the local mafia. Lau Kin Ming, a young mafia member, infiltrates the police force.

programme.title: Memento
programme.desc: A story told both forwards and backwards in time about an ex- insurance investigator, unable to remember new thoughts, who uses notes and tattoos to hunt for the man he thinks killed his wife.

programme.title: Pusher
programme.desc: A failed drug deal lands petty criminal Frank in debt to a ruthless Copenhagen drug lord. Mads Mikkelsen stars in a gritty, violent crime film.

programme.title: The Thicket
programme.desc: When a bounty hunter and a band of unlikely heroes pursue a brutal killer, they find themselves in a deadly no-man's-land known as the Thicket.

programme.title: Following
programme.desc: A young London writer follows strangers for inspiration, but his hobby becomes an obsession, leading him further into their lives than he ever intended.

programme.title: Eaten Alive
programme.desc: Psychotic redneck Judd owns a dilapidated hotel in rural Texas, where he murders people and then feeds their remains to his large pet crocodile in the swamp beside his hotel.

programme.title: What Lies Below
programme.desc: A 16-year-old girl returns home from camp and learns her mother has a new boyfriend, one she intends to marry; a man whose charm, intelligence and beauty make him look like he's not human at all.

programme.title: A Bittersweet Life
programme.desc: A gangster starts a violent feud after he refuses to kill his boss's cheating girlfriend.

programme.title: To Catch A Killer: Part 1
programme.desc: As he investigates the missing person report of a teenager, detective Kozenczak becomes concerned that local businessman John Wayne Gacy may be responsible. However, their evidence is circumstantial.

programme.title: You Were Never Really Here
programme.desc: Joe is a hired gun who rescues trafficked girls, using brutal methods against those responsible.

programme.title: Crabs!
programme.desc: In the middle of prom night, a swarm of murderous crabs descends upon a small coastal town.

programme.title: Hell House LLC
programme.desc: Five years after 15 people were killed during a haunted house tour, a documentary crew visits the scene to investigate what really happened.

programme.title: Hell House LLC II: The Abbadon Hotel
programme.desc: Eight years after a hotel's tragic opening, an investigative journalist is convinced key evidence remains in the abandoned hotel.

programme.title: Hell House LLC III: Lake Of Fire
programme.desc: The Abaddon Hotel will once again be open to the public. Russell Wynn has taken his audience-interactive show, Insomnia, into the abandoned hotel that is rumored to be haunted.

programme.title: The Hit
programme.desc: A hit man is sent to Spain to kidnap an ex-criminal and transport him to Paris for execution.

programme.title: Black Death
programme.desc: Set during the time of the first outbreak of bubonic plague in England, a young monk is given the task of learning the truth about reports of people being brought back to life in a small village.

programme.title: Quest for Fire
programme.desc: A prehistoric Cro-Magnon tribe depends on an ever-burning source of fire, which eventually extinguishes. Lacking the knowledge of how to start a new one, the tribe sends three warriors on a quest.

programme.title: The Paper Tigers
programme.desc: Three Kung Fu prodigies have grown into washed-up, middle-aged men. But when their master is murdered, they must juggle their dead-end jobs, dad duties, and old grudges to avenge his death.

programme.title: Vesper
programme.desc: Struggling to survive with her father after the collapse of Earth's ecosystem, 13-year-old Vesper must use her wits, strength and bio-hacking abilities to fight for the future.

programme.title: Black Robe
programme.desc: In 1634 a Jesuit missionary sets out to convert the tribes in Huron Indian country. A culture-clashing masterpiece from Australian director Bruce Beresford.

programme.title: Corrective Measures
programme.desc: When a powerless new inmate arrives at a prison for supervillains, he must choose his friends wisely, or become a pawn in the deadly game between the Warden and The Lobe.

programme.title: Sympathy For The Devil
programme.desc: After being forced to drive a mysterious passenger at gunpoint, a man finds himself in a high-stakes game of cat and mouse where it becomes clear that not everything is as it seems.

programme.title: God is a Bullet
programme.desc: After his ex-wife is murdered and his daughter is kidnapped, Bob Hightower, infiltrates the group to hunt down their leader with the help of the cult's only female victim escapee.

programme.title: Showgirls
programme.desc: Nomi Malone has what it takes to make it as a Las Vegas showgirl - what she doesn't have is a way in. To survive, she accepts the only job available, lap dancing at a seedy club.

programme.title: Terrifier
programme.desc: On Halloween night, Tara Heyes finds herself as the obsession of a sadistic murderer known as Art the Clown.

programme.title: Terrifier 2
programme.desc: Resurrected by a sinister entity, Art the Clown returns to Miles County to terrorise a teenage girl and her younger brother on Halloween night.

programme.title: Pulse
programme.desc: An employee of a floral shop hangs himself when a colleague goes to his apartment to investigate his absence from work.

programme.title: Caligula: The Ultimate Cut
programme.desc: Excess, violence and corruption mark the notorious emperor's reign in first-century Rome.

programme.title: The Science of Sleep
programme.desc: A man entranced by his dreams and imagination is love-struck with a French woman and feels he can show her his world.

programme.title: Dobermann
programme.desc: The Dobermann and his gang have been hitting the headlines. Banks, post-offices, bullion vans! The whole works! An anthology of robbery, a compilation of hold-ups!

programme.title: The Wind
programme.desc: Lizzy is settling a remote stretch of land on the 19th-century American frontier, when she begins to sense a sinister presence that seems to be borne of the land itself.

programme.title: Come To Daddy
programme.desc: Norval, a privileged man-child travels to the beautiful and remote cabin of his estranged father, in order to reconnect with him as he hasn't seen him in 30 years.

programme.title: Society
programme.desc: A Beverly Hills teen (Billy Warlock) discovers his parents are part of a gruesome orgy cult for the social elite.

programme.title: I Kill Giants
programme.desc: The story of a teenager who struggles through school and family life by escaping into a fantasy world of magic and monsters.

programme.title: Timecrimes
programme.desc: A man accidentally gets into a time machine and travels back in time nearly an hour. Finding himself will be the first of a series of disasters of unforeseeable consequences.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: From their base in the city sewers, turtle heroes Michelangelo, Raphael, Leonardo and Donatello are on a mission to defeat an evil warlord and wipe out crime.

programme.title: The Stunt man
programme.desc: A fugitive stumbles onto a movie set just when they need a new stunt man, takes the job as a way to hide out and falls for the leading lady while facing off with his manipulative director.

programme.title: Final Cut
programme.desc: Life imitates art when the cast and crew of a low-budget zombie flick start to turn into the living dead.

programme.title: Thesis
programme.desc: A Spanish film student (Ana Torrent) finds a videotape showing the torture and murder of a missing coed.

programme.title: Joint Security Area
programme.desc: After a shooting incident at the North-South Korean border DMZ leaves two North Korean soldiers dead, a neutral Swiss and Swedish team investigates what actually happened.

programme.title: Oasis
programme.desc: An irresponsible and childish ex-con befriends a girl with cerebral palsy and develops a progressively stronger bond with her.

programme.title: The House That Jack Built
programme.desc: USA in the 1970s. We follow the highly intelligent Jack over a span of 12 years and are introduced to the murders that define his development as a serial killer.

programme.title: G.I. Samurai
programme.desc: A squadron of Japanese Self-Defence Force soldiers find themselves transported through time to their country's warring states era, when rival samurai clans were battling to become the supreme Shogun.

programme.title: The Holy Mountain
programme.desc: A Mexican master (Alexandro Jodorowsky) leads a Christ figure (Horacio Salinas) and other disciples to a mountain of immortal wise men.

programme.title: Border Security: Australia's Front Line
programme.desc: Officers from Home Affairs, Border Force and Quarantine enforce immigration, customs, quarantine and finance laws at Australia's borders.

programme.title: Border Security: International
programme.desc: Canadian Border Services Officers work on the front lines, intercepting suspicious travellers and contraband from around the world to help keep Canada safe.

programme.desc: A former New York family court judge, Judge Judy acts as a true moral compass for people seeking guidance, resolution and a little common sense.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.sub-title: Written In My Own Heart's Blood
programme.desc: The American Revolution reaches the pivotal Battle of Monmouth; Lord John Grey and Ian race to save William; Brianna makes an important decision.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Denzell must perform a dangerous operation with the skills he's learned from Claire; William asks for help from an unexpected source in his mission to save Jane.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: While on her second honeymoon, World War II nurse Claire Randall is mysteriously transported back in time to 1743 Scotland where she is kidnapped by a group of Highlanders and meets a young man named Jamie.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire is taken to Castle Leoch, where she meets the Laird. As suspicions about her identity run high, Claire tries to blend in, and befriends the mysterious Geillis Duncan.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: As Castle Leoch is readied for a gathering of the MacKenzie clan, Claire attempts to treat a young poisoning victim, placing her at odds with a powerful priest who demands to perform an exorcism.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: As Claire lays plans to escape during the Gathering, the rivalry between Jamie and Dougal intensifies.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: As she accompanies Dougal on a trip to collect the rents owed to the MacKenzies laird, Claire witnesses brutality on both sides of the conflict between the Scottish rebels and the British royal army.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: As Claire and Dougal are brought in for questioning by a royal army commander, they come face to face with the sadistic Black Jack Randall.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and Jamie are thrown together in marriage, but as their emotional and physical relationship unfolds, deeper feelings arise. Claire is ultimately torn between two men in two very different times.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Frank desperately searches for his missing wife, while Claire tries to come to terms with her new marriage. Claire is faced with an emotional quandary as a life-altering opportunity presents itself.

programme.sub-title: Scotland By Land, Air And Sea
programme.desc: A road trip with Sam and Graham. The pair share, and show off, the natural wonders of their home country with the world.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie and the Highlanders rescue Claire from Black Jack Randall. Back at the castle, politics threaten to tear Clan MacKenzie apart and Jamie's scorned lover, Laoghaire, attempts to win him back.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.sub-title: By The Pricking Of My Thumbs
programme.desc: Jamie hopes the newly arrived Duke of Sandringham will help lift the price from his head, while Claire attempts to save an abandoned child.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and Geillis are on trial for witchcraft, while Jamie manages to rescue Claire.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Reunited, Claire and Jamie make their way to Lallybroch, Jamie's family home.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie finds himself between a rock and a hard place when a redcoat deserter from his past resurfaces.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and Jenny set out to rescue Jaime from his redcoat captors. However, when Murtagh joins up, they turn to unorthodox tactics to send word to Jaime.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jaime awaits his death sentence at Wentworth Prison, while Claire and the Highlanders search for a rescue plan.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: A desperate plan manages to free Jaime, but his wounds are more than just physical. At a nearby monastery, Claire attempts to save both Jamie's heart and soul, as his mind lingers on the torture.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and Jamie throw an elaborate dinner party intended to derail investors in Prince Charles' war effort. Meanwhile, Claire reveals to Jamie that Jack Randall is alive.

programme.desc: Reunited, Jamie and Claire attempt to extinguish the fires their dinner party ignited but their relationship is put to the ultimate test when the past rears its ugly head.

programme.desc: Jamie and Claire devise a scheme to stop a wine deal which could fill the Prince's war chest. When Claire learns Jamie has gone back on his word, the couple are met with dire consequences.

programme.title: Outlander

programme.desc: As Jamie puts all of his efforts into turning the Jacobite army away from the impending slaughter at Culloden Moor, Claire attempts to comfort the sick Alex Randall.

programme.title: Outlander

programme.desc: Jamie leads a lonely life until Lallybroch is threatened by redcoats pursing the elusive Jacobite traitor. In Boston, Claire and Frank struggle to co-exist in a marriage haunted by the ghost of Jamie.

programme.desc: In prison, Jamie discovers that an old foe has become the warden and has the power to make his life hell. Claire and Frank both put their best foot forward in marriage.
